// New Delhi, India — Open to Remote

Varun Verma

DevOps Engineer & Systems Programmer

I build and automate infrastructure. Linux-native, container-first, and obsessive about systems that actually work. Background in performance engineering, government-grade security auditing, and shipping production software end to end.

get in touch see my work
Available for remote roles — actively looking
01 / about

Who I am

Systems-minded engineer with a strong Linux foundation, hands-on container experience, and a background in performance-critical software development. I've spent time working at the intersection of code, infrastructure, and security — including a formal cybersecurity audit role at the Comptroller & Auditor General of India.

Before that, I spent 2+ years as the sole technical lead at Wolf Wire Studios — designing core gameplay systems in Unreal Engine 5, profiling GPU pipelines, and shipping a commercial title end to end. That experience taught me what "production" actually means.

Currently building deep into the DevOps stack — Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Terraform, GitHub Actions. My homelab is my lab. I document everything and I write well.

03 / experience

Where I've worked

Oct 2025 — Present
Young Professional — Information Systems Wing
Comptroller & Auditor General of India · New Delhi

Programmer & Systems Consultant

Jan 2022 — Jun 2024
Lead Technical Artist & Gameplay Engineer
Wolf Wire Studios · New Delhi

04 / projects

Things I've built

⚙ ↗
DevOps Capstone Pipeline
Full CI/CD pipeline: GitHub Actions triggers Docker build → pushes to AWS ECR → Terraform provisions EKS cluster → Helm deploys app → Prometheus + Grafana monitors it live. End to end, infra as code.
Docker Kubernetes AWS Terraform GitHub Actions
🎮 ↗
Salvation Hours
Commercial single-player tactical FPS shipped on PC. Built on Unreal Engine 5 with custom C++ gameplay systems. 15% GPU performance improvement via tick pipeline optimization. 2+ years, sole technical lead.
C++ Unreal Engine 5 GPU Optimization Build Systems
🐳 ↗
Homelab Infrastructure
Self-managed Linux homelab running Docker-based services. Includes reverse proxy setup, container networking, service configuration, and monitoring. Used as a live testing ground for the DevOps stack.
Docker Linux Nginx Networking
⚡ ↗
CUDA Parallel Programs
Small collection of CUDA programs exploring GPU parallel computing — memory access patterns, kernel optimization, and thread hierarchy. Published on GitHub as active experiments.
CUDA C++ GPU Computing Parallel Programming
